feedback_body: Share your ideas and vote on features you'd love to see in Bloop. Your feedback shapes our roadmap ❤️

onboard.title: Get onboard
onboard.description: Schedule a call with our Customer Success team. We'll help you set up your first referral/affiliate campaign tailored to your store

chat.title: Chat with us
chat.description: Need quick help? Chat with our team for instant support on setup, campaign performance, or troubleshooting

help_center.title: Help center
help_center.description: Browse our step-by-step guides on creating campaigns, tracking referrals, and boosting conversions

blog.title: Our helpful blog
blog.description: Explore expert tips, dozens of templates, and proven strategies to maximize your referral and affiliate programs.

contact_modal.intro: This setup requires collaboration between you and our team. Please reach out via Live Chat to get started.
